note: Core lessons from markdown.engineering (v2.1.88), verified and updated against live v2.1.90/v2.1.91/v2.1.92/v2.1.94/v2.1.96/v2.1.100/v2.1.101/v2.1.104/v2.1.107/v2.1.108/v2.1.109/v2.1.110/v2.1.111/v2.1.112/v2.1.113 binaries. Chapter 17 (L85) covers v2.1.112-v2.1.113 changes: Remote Workflow Commands (/autopilot, /bugfix, /dashboard, /docs, /investigate) removed outright, /less-permission-prompts renamed to /fewer-permission-prompts, four new env vars (CLAUDE_ASYNC_AGENT_STALL_TIMEOUT_MS, CLAUDE_BG_BACKEND, CLAUDE_CODE_BS_AS_CTRL_BACKSPACE, CLAUDE_CODE_DECSTBM), new GrowthBook flag tengu_marlin_porch for DECSTBM fullscreen margin support. v2.1.112 produced no material bundle changes.
